description_long: This lamp features a dual rectangular head design with red and metallic accents, mounted on a sturdy, adjustable tripod stand. The lamp heads are encased in a robust frame, with visible bolts and a slightly weathered, industrial finish. The central support pole is segmented, suggesting height adjustability, and the tripod base provides stability with rubberized feet. The lamp heads are oriented side by side, each with a recessed panel that likely houses the light source. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some plastic or rubber components for grip and protection. The design is utilitarian, suitable for urban or industrial environments, and emphasizes durability and functionality.
description: A dual-head industrial floor lamp with red and metallic finishes, mounted on an adjustable tripod base. The lamp features a rugged, utilitarian design with visible bolts and weathered surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing both rectangular lamp heads, the central support pole, and the full tripod base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lamp heads and the thickness of the frame, with the tripod legs extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of the lamp heads and the central support structure, with visible weathering.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lamp heads' profile and the robust construction of the tripod base.
